message: test(e2e): fix core homepage specs against Turbopack streaming + framer-motion - HomePage POM: use CSS class selector (.uppercase.tracking-widest) for stat labels to avoid matching Prompts inside "JeffreysPrompts" nav - HomePage POM: use locator-based scrollToFooter to prevent execution context destruction during Turbopack streaming SSR - HomePage POM: wait for category filter group DOM attachment before enumerating buttons (framer-motion animates from opacity:0 with delay:1.2s) - console-monitor: ignore Service Worker registration errors caused by serviceWorkers: "block" in Playwright config - homepage.spec.ts: use gotoHomepage streaming stall recovery for footer tests; replace page.evaluate scroll with locator-based scrollIntoViewIfNeeded - homepage-pom.spec.ts: increase slow network throughput to 1.5Mbps for Turbopack dev bundles; wait for prompt cards after category filter Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6
